name: BaseLayout
summary: App shell: document head, mono typography, route-aware companion, header/footer, and global client behaviour.
what: Wraps every page with metadata, IBM Plex Mono, the base and editorial theme stylesheets, GridBackdrop, Header/Footer, and AadithCompanion on overview routes while keeping Work and Lab detail routes full-width.
why: Centralises page chrome, companion visibility, and restrained vanilla-JS behaviour so individual pages only describe content.
whenToUse: Use bare=true for gated/standalone screens that should hide nav and the companion.
Override companion only when a future route needs behavior different from the route-aware default.
whenNotToUse: Do not import inside another component - it is a top-level layout.
Do not re-implement route/reveal observers or companion route checks in a page; they already live here.
a11yNotes: Respects prefers-reduced-motion and keeps content visible without JavaScript.
Project detail routes retain the full reading canvas without an adjacent chat rail.
source: Generated from Astro source + design-system/ai/index.json by component-metadata.py.
